# GitHub About Suggestions

## Suggested About Text

Beginner-to-advanced, hands-on Python for Data Engineering with files, APIs, ETL, databases, testing, and real pipeline projects.

## Suggested Topics

- python
- data-engineering
- data-pipelines
- etl
- elt
- sqlite
- api
- csv
- json
- pytest
- beginner-friendly
- learning-resource
- portfolio-project
- python-course
- open-source-education

## Suggested Website

If you later publish notes, a blog post, or a documentation site, add it as the repository website field.
